case_title: NATALIE ESTRADA VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY ESTRADA, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF NATALIE ESTRADA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & CO., REPRESENTED BY WENDY HERNANDEZ, BUSINESS SUPPORT CONSULTANT IS PRESENT. PLIANTIFF IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT AT 1:45 P.M. AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED FOR NON APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
